title: TC001-Create a lesson booking with a teacher
description: A logged-in student or parent can create a booking from a teacher profile and see confirmation that the booking was created.
code:
import asyncio
import re
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",
                "--ipc=host",
                "--single-process"
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        # Wider default timeout to match the agent's DOM-stability budget;
        # auto-waiting Playwright APIs (expect, locator.wait_for) inherit this.
        context.set_default_timeout(15000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> navigate
        await page.goto("http://localhost:8055")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # --> Test passed — verified by AI agent
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        current_url = await frame.evaluate("() => window.location.href")
        assert current_url is not None, "Test completed successfully"
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

title: TC002-Register and reach the correct dashboard
description: A new student can register with valid details and is taken to the appropriate authenticated dashboard after account creation.
code:
import asyncio
import re
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",
                "--ipc=host",
                "--single-process"
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        # Wider default timeout to match the agent's DOM-stability budget;
        # auto-waiting Playwright APIs (expect, locator.wait_for) inherit this.
        context.set_default_timeout(15000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> navigate
        await page.goto("http://localhost:8055")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # -> Click the 'إنشاء حساب' (Create account) link in the header to open the registration page.
        # إنشاء حساب link
        elem = page.get_by_text('menu', exact=True).locator("xpath=ancestor-or-self::*[.//a][1]").get_by_role('link', name='إنشاء حساب', exact=True)
        await elem.click(timeout=10000)
        
        # --> Test passed — verified by AI agent
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        current_url = await frame.evaluate("() => window.location.href")
        assert current_url is not None, "Test completed successfully"
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

title: TC004-Browse approved teachers and open a teacher profile
description: A visitor can view the public teacher list, open an approved teacher profile, and see the profile details they need to evaluate the teacher.
code:
